basic_details.job_title: IIT Ropar Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: IIT Ropar – Technology and Innovation Foundation (AWaDH)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Ropar – Technology and Innovation Foundation (AWaDH) Company Secretary Notification 2026 has been released (release date not specified) on the official website https://awadh.iitrpr.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Ropar TIF AWaDH Company Secretary Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Qualified Company Secretary (ACS/FCS) from ICSI, Bachelor's Degree in Commerce, Law, Management or related discipline, Certificate of Practice (COP) preferred, LLB and/or additional qualifications in Corporate Law, Governance, Compliance or Secretarial Practice preferred, Minimum 1-3 years relevant experience
qualification.details: Company Secretary (CS) / Assistant Manager / Manager (Compliance): Qualified Company Secretary (ACS/FCS) from the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) with valid ICSI Membership Number; Bachelor's Degree in Commerce, Law, Management or related discipline; Minimum 1-3 years relevant experience. Certificate of Practice (COP) preferred. LLB and/or additional qualifications in Corporate Law, Governance, Compliance or Secretarial Practice preferred.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Ropar TIF AWaDH to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Company Secretary Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Ropar TIF AWaDH Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Ropar TIF AWaDH Company Secretary (CS) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Ropar Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Company Secretary (CS) / Assistant Manager / Manager (Compliance): Qualified Company Secretary (ACS/FCS) from the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) with valid ICSI Membership Number; Bachelor's Degree in Commerce, Law, Management or related discipline; Minimum 1-3 years relevant experience. Certificate of Practice (COP) preferred. LLB and/or additional qualifications in Corporate Law, Governance, Compliance or Secretarial Practice preferred.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
IIT Ropar Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
IIT Ropar Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Ropar Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Ropar TIF AWaDH to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Ropar TIF AWaDH Company Secretary (CS) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIT Ropar TIF AWaDH Company Secretary (CS) recruitment is 13th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Company Secretary (CS) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Company Secretary (CS) post at IIT Ropar – Technology and Innovation Foundation (AWaDH).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Company Secretary (CS) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Qualified Company Secretaries (ACS/FCS) from ICSI, with a Bachelor's Degree in Commerce, Law, Management, or a related discipline. Relevant experience is also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Company Secretary (CS) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Company Secretary (CS) position ranges from Rs. 500000 to Rs. 600000 Per Annum (₹5.00 – ₹6.00 LPA).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Company Secretary (CS) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Company Secretary (CS) post primarily involves shortlisting of applications.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Ropar TIF AWaDH located?
faq.answer: IIT Ropar TIF AWaDH is located in Rupnagar, Punjab, with the pincode 140001.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations provided for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxations. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: This is a Full Time job opportunity.
